B2C Campaign - Canva Brief

Canva design brief for the HeyZack B2C crowdfunding campaign deck

Canva Design Brief: HeyZack B2C Crowdfunding Deck

Project Overview

Project: Crowdfunding Campaign Deck Client: HeyZack Slides: 12 Format: 16:9 (1920x1080) Style: Lifestyle-focused, aspirational, modern tech

Brand Kit

Colors

NameHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Trust elements, security messaging
Primary Pink#E82F89CTAs, excitement, emotion
Black#2E2D2CBody text
Light Grey#E9EDEFCard backgrounds
White#FFFFFFPage backgrounds
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Title/closing slides, key moments

Typography

ElementFontWeightSize
HeadlinesPoppins or InterBold48-64px
SubheadsPoppins or InterSemiBold32-40px
BodyInterRegular18-24px
Data/StatsPoppinsExtraBold72-120px
CaptionsInterRegular14-16px

Logo

  • Primary: Stylized pink “Z” mark
  • Wordmark: “HeyZack” in brand colors
  • Placement: Top-left corner or centered on title/closing slides
  • Clear space: Minimum 20px around logo

Slide Specifications

Slide 1: Title Slide

Template: Hero with lifestyle imagery Background: Living room scene with smart devices (add gradient overlay) Content:

  • Logo: Centered, with glow effect
  • Headline: “Your Home. Just Smarter.” (64px, white, bold)
  • Subhead: “AI-Powered Smart Home for Everyone” (32px, white)
  • CTA: “Join the Revolution” badge (24px, white on pink button) Visual: Happy family/couple in modern smart home setting

Slide 2: The Problem

Template: Problem statement Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Smart Homes Shouldn’t Be Complicated” (48px, #243984)
  • 3 pain point cards:
    • “Multiple apps for different devices”
    • “Confusing setup and installation”
    • “High costs, limited benefits” Visual: Frustrated person with multiple phone apps (left side) Styling: Pain points in #E82F89 accent boxes

Slide 3: Meet Your Personas

Template: Dual persona Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “Built for Homeowners Like You” (48px, #243984)
  • Two persona cards:
    • Tyler (Tech-Savvy Tyler)
      • Age: 28-35
      • “Wants cutting-edge tech that just works”
    • Emma (Energy-Conscious Emma)
      • Age: 35-50
      • “Cares about savings and sustainability” Visual: Lifestyle photos representing each persona

Slide 4: The Solution

Template: Product hero Background: White with gradient accent Content:

  • Headline: “Introducing HeyZack AI Home” (48px, #243984)
  • 3 value props with icons:
    • “One App for Everything”
    • “AI That Learns Your Lifestyle”
    • “Works Together, Automatically” Visual: Product ecosystem shot with app interface Accent: Pink glow behind product image

Slide 5: How It Works

Template: Step-by-step Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Setup in Minutes. Smart Forever.” (48px, #243984)
  • 3-step process (vertical or horizontal):
    1. “Plug & Play” + “No electrician needed” (icon: plug)
    2. “Connect” + “One app, all devices” (icon: network)
    3. “Relax” + “AI handles the rest” (icon: couch/zen) Styling: Each step in a card with icon, connected by dotted line

Slide 6: Product Range

Template: Product grid Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “128 Products. Endless Possibilities.” (48px, #243984)
  • 6 category cards with icons:
    • Lighting (dimmer icon)
    • Climate (thermostat icon)
    • Security (lock icon)
    • Sensors (motion icon)
    • Curtains (shade icon)
    • Energy (meter icon) Visual: Clean product photos in each card Price teaser: “Starting from $29”

Slide 7: AI Magic

Template: Feature showcase Background: Gradient fade (subtle blue to white) Content:

  • Headline: “AI That Actually Helps” (48px, #243984)
  • 3 AI features:
    • “Learns when you wake up, adjusts thermostat” (icon: sun)
    • “Detects when you leave, secures your home” (icon: lock)
    • “Optimizes energy, cuts your bills” (icon: lightning) Visual: App interface showing AI in action Callout: “20-30% average energy savings” (in pink highlight box)

Slide 8: Tyler’s Story

Template: Testimonial/story Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Tech Without the Hassle” (48px, #243984)
  • Quote: “I’ve tried every smart home system. HeyZack is the first one where everything just… works together.” — Tyler, Austin TX
  • Stats:
    • “45 devices” — Connected in one weekend
    • “Zero hubs” — Everything works together Visual: Tyler persona image, modern apartment background Styling: Quote in italic, larger font, pink accent on stats

Slide 9: Emma’s Story

Template: Testimonial/story Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “Savings That Make Sense” (48px, #243984)
  • Quote: “I was spending $400/month on energy. Now it’s $280. HeyZack paid for itself in 3 months.” — Emma, Portland OR
  • Stats:
    • “$120/mo” — Saved on energy
    • “3 months” — To ROI Visual: Emma persona image, family home background Styling: Quote in italic, savings stat in large pink text

Slide 10: Pricing & Rewards

Template: Pricing tiers Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Exclusive Backer Rewards” (48px, #243984)
  • 3 reward tiers:
    • Starter Kit — $149 (Was $199)
      • 5 devices, 1 hub, app access
    • Home Kit — $349 (Was $499)
      • 15 devices, 2 hubs, AI features
    • Whole Home — $699 (Was $999)
      • 30 devices, 4 hubs, premium support Visual: Badge showing “30% OFF Kickstarter Exclusive” CTA: “Claim Your Reward” button (pink)

Slide 11: Social Proof

Template: Trust elements Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “Join Thousands of Smart Homeowners” (48px, #243984)
  • Trust elements:
    • “4.8/5” — App Store rating
    • “10,000+” — Happy customers
    • “128” — Products in ecosystem
  • Press logos (if available)
  • Featured in: TechCrunch, Verge, etc. (placeholder) Visual: Happy customer photos grid or testimonial carousel

Slide 12: Call to Action

Template: CTA hero Background: Linear gradient #243984 → #E82F89 (135°) Content:

  • Headline: “Make Your Home Smarter Today” (48px, white)
  • Subhead: “Back us on Kickstarter and save 30%” (32px, white)
  • CTA button: “BACK THIS PROJECT” (large, white text on pink button)
  • URL: kickstarter.com/heyzack
  • Logo: White version, centered at bottom Visual: Product family shot with lifestyle overlay

Design Guidelines

Layout

  • Margins: 80px all sides
  • Grid: 12-column for flexibility
  • Alignment: Center for headlines, left-align body text

Visual Hierarchy

  1. Headline (largest, brand blue)
  2. Key value/emotion (large numbers, pink accent)
  3. Supporting text (regular weight, black)
  4. Captions/labels (small, muted)

Imagery

  • Lifestyle: Real people in real homes, not sterile showrooms
  • Product shots: Clean, well-lit, consistent angles
  • Diversity: Inclusive representation
  • Emotion: Happy, relaxed, in control

Tone

  • Approachable: Not intimidating tech-speak
  • Aspirational: The home you’ve always wanted
  • Trustworthy: Real savings, real results
